# PHIL.057 ? Hegelianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** hegelianism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Dialectical process (thesis-antithesis-synthesis); absolute idealism; Spirit's self-realization; historical development; unity of opposites

## Application
See reality as dialectical process; recognize contradictions as productive; historical development toward absolute; systematic totality

## Key Values
- Dialectic
- Historical development
- Absolute Spirit
- Synthesis

philosophy, modern-western, hegelianism
